info.name: Smart Report Engine — Complete API Testing
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for testing all Smart Report Engine APIs deployed on Render.

Base URL: https://smart-report-engine.onrender.com

**Note:** Free Render instances spin down after inactivity. The first request may take 30-50 seconds to wake up.

## Endpoints
- GET /health — Health check
- GET /tenants/:id — Tenant config lookup
- POST /reports/generate — Generate HTML or PDF reports
- POST /ingest/fhir — Ingest FHIR Bundle and generate report
- POST /ingest/hl7 — Ingest HL7 message and generate report
- GET /metrics — Prometheus metrics

item.name: 🏥 Health & System
item.description: System-level endpoints for health checks and observability.

request.description: Returns the server status, environment, uptime, and list of registered pages. Use this to verify the server is alive.
Returns Prometheus-compatible metrics in text exposition format. Includes counters for ingestion, cache hits, PDF generation, errors, etc.
Tests that unknown routes return a proper 404 JSON error.
Fetches the configuration for tenant-alpha (Essential report type).
Fetches the configuration for tenant-beta (InDepth report type).
Tests that a non-existent tenant returns a proper 404 error.

item.name: 📊 Report Generation (JSON)
item.description: Core report generation via raw JSON input. Supports HTML and PDF output.

request.description: Generates an Essential-type health report as HTML for tenant-alpha. Returns JSON with the HTML string, overall score, and severity.

exec: pm.test('Has overall score and severity', function () {

request.description: Generates an Essential-type health report as a downloadable PDF for tenant-alpha. The response is a raw binary PDF file — use 'Send and Download' in Postman to save it.

exec: pm.test('PDF body is not empty', function () {

request.description: Generates an InDepth-type health report as HTML for tenant-beta. Includes 7 health profiles with abnormal values for thorough testing.
Generates an InDepth multi-page health report as a downloadable PDF for tenant-beta. Use 'Send and Download' in Postman to save the PDF file.

exec: pm.test('PDF body is not empty', function () {

request.description: Tests validation — sends an invalid body with empty fields and out-of-range values to confirm proper 400 error handling.
Tests that a request for a non-existent tenant returns a proper 404 TENANT_NOT_FOUND error.

item.name: 🔬 FHIR Ingestion
item.description: FHIR Bundle ingestion endpoint. Accepts a FHIR R4 Bundle and converts it to a health report.

request.description: Ingests a FHIR R4 Bundle containing a Complete Blood Count diagnostic report and generates an HTML report.
Ingests a FHIR Bundle and generates a downloadable PDF report. Use 'Send and Download' in Postman.

item.name: 📡 HL7 Ingestion
item.description: HL7 v2.x ORU message ingestion. Accepts a raw HL7 message string and converts it to a health report.

request.description: Ingests a raw HL7 v2.5 ORU^R01 message containing CBC and Lipid Panel results and generates an HTML report.
Ingests a raw HL7 message and generates a downloadable PDF report. Use 'Send and Download' in Postman.
